entries.title: Uhhh I don’t think this is the final step my agent found for RCE… lollll
entries.summary: Uhhh I don’t think this is the final step my agent found for RCE… lollll 0xSha: Here's wp2shell 🐚 single-file, zero-dependency PoC for the WordPress core pre-auth RCE (CVE-2026-63030 + CVE-2026-60137) one anonymous HTTP request: REST batch route confusion → unauth SQLi → admin hash → shell default install. no plugins. no login. the best of other public

entries.title: LLM cliché highlighter
entries.summary: Tool: LLM cliché highlighter I got frustrated reading yet another article that was crammed with the clichés of LLM-generated writing - "no fluff, no filler, no jargon" type stuff - so I had Fable 5 vibe code up this app for highlighting ten common patterns that show up in that sort of writing. DNS Requests via ANSI Escape Codes David Leadbeater originally discovered an interesting behavior in the macOS Terminal app that allowed a special sequence of ANSI escape codes to issue DNS requests. entries.title: Yeah, the time to exploit something given a patch is basically zero and it honestly makes me sorta bullish on closed source. This exploit would take a...
entries.summary: Yeah, the time to exploit something given a patch is basically zero and it honestly makes me sorta bullish on closed source. This exploit would take any ai system days to find (or never be found) without a patch. Justin Elze: We spent months debating how much frontier models would compress time to exploit. It might end up being WordPress where we finally see it play out with actual impact.

entries.title: JDK 21 FFM API 跨语言指针滞留导致的悬挂访问风险
entries.summary: JDK 21 的 Foreign Function & Memory API 位于 java.lang.foreign 包。它允许 Java 代码直接分配堆外内存、查找 native 符号并发起 downcall。MemorySegment 在 Java 侧带有地址、长度、访问状态和所属 Arena，关闭 Arena 后继续通过 Java 访问该段会被运行时拒绝。
